text.message: Wow, thought you would leave the 3/11/6 for oj
Assuming youre going to ore port green
That was such a bummer of a 7 lol
Dang I really didn’t think about my lack of port options lol
0 wheat blue, otherwise I would offer it
Oj pacing army, why am I the only steal?
Just will run away with it with devs
You have equal army potential to me
You just secured a great settle spot before going for devs
Yes with my 2 down devs and 2 played knights
You will have a wheat port and an ore port, there is no stopping you
You were saying about running away with it?
Hypothetical if you had both ports
It will still be an interesting build to 10
But be real about how I would get to the ports
Oj do you need wood for wheat port? Happy to give
Well looks like its neither of us now lol
Green wins in two turns if I dont get a knight
Hes on 9 - can’t help him pop for win lol
